backend/main.mo: Motoko canister defining user profiles, strategies, licenses, trades, and access-controlled APIs for reading and updating user data with various domain types.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report with a placeholder features array.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of all frontend files describing components, hooks, utilities, and styling.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base and theme variables defining light/dark modes and design tokens.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entrypoint that loads the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/PHASE1_BACKEND_IMPLEMENTATION_C: Detailed multi-section checklist outlining backend implementation steps for Phase 1, covering documentation, types, data storage, and APIs.
frontend/ROADMAP_BATCH_EXECUTION.md: Execution plan for roadmap phases 3–8 with batch-by-batch frontend and backend tasks and constraints.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component handling authentication state, initial loading, profile setup modal, and rendering the app shell.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Login/logout button managing Internet Identity authentication and query cache clearing.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal that collects display name and optional account ID, then saves a new user profile via a mutation.
frontend/src/components/common/AccessDen: Simple screen showing an access denied alert for unauthorized users.
frontend/src/components/common/ToastProv: Context provider that manages toast notifications with auto‑dismiss and type-based styling.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/AuditL: Loads and displays recent audit log entries in a scrollable table with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Dashbo: Header with navigation between dashboard and settings plus user name display and login button.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Equity: Fetches and renders an equity curve chart using Recharts with loading and error handling.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/LiveLo: Live terminal-style log viewer that polls bot uplink status and supports manual connectivity tests.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/LivePu: Duplicate terminal-style component showing periodic uplink pings and connectivity test results.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Perfor: Displays equity curve data using an area chart with loading, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/System: Shows bot heartbeat status, license state, cycle warnings, and last heartbeat with loading and error handling.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Uplink: Controls and displays uplink status with an animated indicator and toggle switch.
Main app container managing navigation between dashboard, settings, and payment result screens with header and footer.
frontend/src/components/settings/Connect: Presents bot connection status and opens a wizard to configure public key and bot URL.
Multi-step modal to generate keys, link the bot’s public key, and set the bot URL with validation and mutation calls.
frontend/src/components/settings/Profile: Empty placeholder file containing no implementation.
frontend/src/components/settings/StripeC: Modal for entering Stripe secret key and allowed countries, validates input, and saves configuration via mutation.
frontend/src/components/settings/Subscri: Displays subscription tiers, handles Stripe checkout session creation, and shows Stripe config prompt for admins.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the backend actor based on identity, refreshing dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdmin.ts: Provides hooks for admin checks and managing licenses, including fetching, creating, updating, and revoking.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuditLedger.ts: Fetches audit log entries from the backend with periodic refresh.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUserProfile: Retrieves and updates the caller's user profile using backend actor methods.
frontend/src/hooks/useEquityCurve.ts: Builds an equity curve from the user’s trade history by computing running PnL.
frontend/src/hooks/useFetchSignalsTest.t: Runs a backend connectivity test for fetching signals and displays success or error toasts.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeartbeat.ts: Fetches heartbeat data for a given account with periodic polling.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Manages Internet Identity login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient integration.
frontend/src/hooks/useLicense.ts: Retrieves the caller’s license status from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useLinkBotPublicKey.t: Registers a bot public key via mutation and invalidates related queries with toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useLiveLogs.ts: Fetches recent trades for the user as live logs with periodic refresh.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetBotUrl.ts: Validates and updates the bot URL through the backend, handling errors and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useStripe.ts: React Query hooks for checking Stripe config, updating settings, creating checkout sessions, and fetching session status.
frontend/src/hooks/useTiers.ts: Hooks to list subscription tiers and fetch a specific tier using actor calls.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrades.ts: Provides a paginated trade‑fetching hook via actor.getTradesPaginated.
frontend/src/hooks/useUplink.ts: Hooks to fetch the bot profile and toggle uplink state with toast feedback.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base styles with custom theme variables and a glassmorphism utility.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function cn merges class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point initializing React, QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and global styles.
frontend/src/screens/AdminScreen.tsx: Admin UI for viewing, creating, updating, and revoking licenses with tabbed layout.
frontend/src/screens/DashboardScreen.tsx: Dashboard assembling uplink control, live terminal, telemetry, and audit panels.
frontend/src/screens/OverviewScreen.tsx: Displays the user's license status and account info with contextual UI states.
frontend/src/screens/PaymentFailureScree: Simple screen showing payment cancellation details with a return button.
frontend/src/screens/PaymentSuccessScree: Success confirmation screen after payment with navigation back to dashboard.
frontend/src/screens/SettingsRouteScreen: Empty placeholder for settings route screen.
frontend/src/screens/SettingsScreen.tsx: Settings page with tabs for bot connection and subscription management.
frontend/src/screens/TradesScreen.tsx: Trade history screen with filters, pagination, and table rendering using hooks for user profile and paginated trades.
frontend/src/utils/actorErrorMessage.ts: Normalizes raw actor errors into cleaner user-facing messages with pattern-based handling.
frontend/src/utils/encoding.ts: Provides hex-string to byte-array conversion utilities and the reverse.
frontend/src/utils/format.ts: Formats timestamps and computes PnL values for trades.
frontend/src/utils/tweetnaclSmokeTest.ts: Empty placeholder file for tweetnacl testing.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Helpers for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters using query strings, hashes, and sessionStorage.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining theme extensions, colors, fonts, animations, and plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata detailing backend requirements, constraints, and pending Stripe integration features.
